'''''Redoubtable''''' was an early-model [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]]. It was later renamed the '''''Destiny of Yevetha'''''.

==History==
After taking significant damage in the retreat from the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], she was sent to the [[Black Fifteen|Black-15]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] at [[N'zoth]]. The ship was seized by [[Nil Spaar]] of the [[Yevetha]] during their uprising, and renamed the ''Destiny of Yevetha.'' After the Yevetha completed her repairs, she served in the Yevethan fleet during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

''Redoubtable'' jumped to [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] along with the other [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-design starships which left the Yevethan fleet under the command of [[Sil Sorannan]].
